violations.text: Menu was observed lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as protein bites) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC put eggs on bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Various protein bites/cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name and address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fridge/freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
